annotations.label: Real iff equals conjugate

anchor.section: Complex conjugate, absolute value, argument and division
anchor.snippet: A complex number is real if and only if it equals its own conjugate

annotations.note: Verified: `conj z = z ↔ ∃ r : ℝ, z = r`.

annotations.label: de Moivre's formula

anchor.snippet: The n -th power of a complex number can be computed using de Moivre's formula

annotations.note: Verified: `(cos θ + sin θ * I)^n = cos (n*θ) + sin (n*θ) * I` is de Moivre's formula.

annotations.label: C is algebraically closed

annotations.label: Quadratic extension definition of C

anchor.snippet: One formal definition of the complex numbers is that they form the quadratic extension field

annotations.note: Mathlib defines ℂ concretely as a pair of reals, not as the quadratic extension ℝ[X]/(X²+1).

annotations.label: Polynomial ring R[X]

anchor.snippet: forms a commutative ring , called the polynomial ring

annotations.note: Verified: `Polynomial R` is the standard polynomial-ring type over a semiring R.

annotations.note: Verified: the first isomorphism theorem for rings is formalised; no specific construction of ℂ as ℝ[X]/(X²+1) is provided.

annotations.label: Matrix representation of complex numbers

anchor.snippet: Complex numbers a + bi can also be represented by 2 × 2 matrices

annotations.note: No 2×2 real-matrix representation of ℂ is defined in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Ring isomorphism to matrix field

annotations.note: No corresponding ring isomorphism between ℂ and the 2×2 real matrices is formalised.

annotations.label: Cauchy–Riemann characterization

anchor.snippet: A real differentiable function is complex differentiable if and only if it satisfies the Cauchy–Riemann equations

annotations.note: Verified via semantic search: this lemma states complex-differentiability ↔ real-differentiability + the Cauchy–Riemann identity `D f (i) = i · D f (1)`.

annotations.label: Existence of complex eigenvalues

annotations.label: Hermitian matrix

anchor.snippet: hermitian matrices generalize symmetric matrices

annotations.note: Verified: `Matrix.IsHermitian A ↔ Aᴴ = A`.

annotations.label: Unitary matrix

annotations.note: Verified: `Matrix.unitaryGroup n α` (lowercase u) is the group of unitary matrices; cited `Matrix.UnitaryGroup` is only a namespace.
